channel.title: KMA Fitness & Martial Arts
channel.description: Recent content on KMA Fitness & Martial Arts

item.title: About KMA
item.description: Est. 2005 About KMA Makati's home for martial arts — built on community, discipline, and decades of experience. Our Story More than two decades on the mats KMA Fitness & Martial Arts was founded by Stephen Kamphuis in Makati's Salcedo Village. What started as a small training group has grown into one of the Philippines' largest martial arts communities. As the Philippine headquarters of the international Team Fabricio BJJ network, KMA connects over 30 affiliated schools across the country — from Manila to the provinces.

item.title: Affiliated Schools
item.description: Team Fabricio Philippines Affiliated Schools Over 30 gyms across the Philippines and beyond — all part of the Team Fabricio international BJJ family. KMA Fitness & Martial Arts is the Philippine headquarters of Team Fabricio, the international BJJ network founded by Master Fabricio Martins. Under Professor Stephen Kamphuis's leadership, the network has grown to cover Luzon, Visayas, Mindanao — and even has an international affiliate in New Zealand. Metro Manila KMA Fitness & Martial Arts HQ — Makati

item.title: Black Belts
item.description: All Ranks Black Belts The highest rank in the Team Fabricio Philippines lineage. Each black belt represents years of dedicated training, competition, and growth. 5th 5th Degree Stephen Kamphuis BB 2004 → 1st 2007 → 2nd 2010 → 3rd 2012 → 4th 2017 → 5th Aug 2022 Profile → 3rd 3rd Degree Jangwon Byeon BB May 2014 → 1st May 2017 → 2nd May 2020 → 3rd May 2023

item.title: Blue Belts
item.description: All Ranks Blue Belts A solid foundation in fundamentals — demonstrating effective technique, defensive awareness, and growing mat confidence. 4th Stripe Abigail Obias Arellano November 2025 Alexander Tiongson Adam Leonard Austria Arnie Brioso July 25 Carlos Garcia June 25 Francis Carlo Serrano Dec 22 Efren Bautista Sept 23 Jason Fernandez Blue Dec 22 / Nov 23 / June 24 Jaan Davy Caraga Jericho Melchor Dec 23 Lucy Calaycay Dec 23

item.title: Boxing
item.description: The Sweet Science Boxing Footwork, combinations, and conditioning — private sessions available every day. The Program Build your hands Boxing at KMA focuses on fundamentals that work — proper stance, footwork, jab-cross combinations, defensive head movement, and ring awareness. Whether you're training for fitness or to fight, you'll build real skills. Our boxing program runs primarily through private one-on-one sessions, available every day during gym hours. This means you get full attention from your coach, working at your pace on what matters most for your development.

item.title: Brazilian Jiu Jitsu
item.description: Team Fabricio Philippines Brazilian Jiu Jitsu Gi & No-Gi training for all levels — from your first class to competition prep. Our Core Program The art of ground fighting BJJ is the foundation of KMA. Since day one, our mats have been home to practitioners of all levels — from complete beginners learning their first guard pass to black belts sharpening their competition game. We offer both Gi and No-Gi classes throughout the week.

item.title: Brendo Pudan
item.description: Instructor Brendo Pudan BJJ competitor and instructor at KMA. Philippine BJJ gold medalist representing Team Fabricio. BJJ Black Belt Team Fabricio About Brendo Competitor and instructor Brendo Pudan is a BJJ competitor and instructor at KMA, representing Team Fabricio Philippines. A gold medalist in Philippine BJJ competition, Brendo brings proven competitive skills to his coaching. At KMA, Brendo teaches BJJ — working with students from beginners through to advanced practitioners.

item.title: Brown Belts
item.description: All Ranks Brown Belts Refining and mastering technique — preparing for the responsibility of the black belt. 4th Stripe John F. Garcia 2nd March 2023 → 3rd Nov 23 → 4th May 24 Kenneth Menia Oct 2024 Christopher Cortez 1st July 2022 → 2nd March 2023 → Dec 2023 → 4th May 24 Francis Angelo Castillo 3rd Oct 2024 → 4th June 2025 Darren Ngo B. Belt March 2022 → 1st Dec 2022 → 2nd June 2023 → Dec 24

item.title: Class Schedule
item.description: KMA Makati Salcedo Class Schedule Le Domaine, Tordesillas Street · Mon–Fri 07:00–21:00 · Sat 07:00–19:00 · Sun 08:00–17:00 Mon Tue Wed Thu Fri Sat Sun 07:00 08:00 09:00 10:00 11:00 12:00 13:00 14:00 15:00 16:00 17:00 18:00 19:00 20:00 BJJ Gi 12:30–14:00 Ziggy BJJ Gi Beginners 19:00–21:00 Godwin BJJ No Gi 12:30–14:00 Brendo BJJ No Gi 19:00–21:00 Ken BJJ Gi & No Gi 12:30–14:00 Ziggy & Brendo BJJ No Gi Beginners

item.title: Contact
item.description: Get Started Train with us Drop in for a class or get in touch. All levels welcome — from complete beginners to seasoned competitors. Get in touch Location Ground Floor Le Domaine Tordesillas Street, Salcedo Village Makati City, Philippines Phone (02) 8551-4449 Text: 0917 824 2420 Email mail@bjjphilippines.com Facebook KMA Fitness & Martial Arts Gym Hours Mon–Fri: 7am–9pm Sat: 7am–7pm Sun: 8am–5pm First time? Just show up during class hours or contact us first.

item.title: Estie Liwanen
item.description: Instructor Estie Liwanen BJJ Black Belt. Open Masters Games competitor. Instructor in BJJ and Judo at KMA. BJJ Black Belt Judo Team Fabricio About Estie Competitor and coach Estie Liwanen is a BJJ black belt and active competitor who represents KMA and Team Fabricio Philippines on the international stage. Most recently, she competed at the Open Masters Games in Abu Dhabi 2026, bringing home a medal for the Philippines. At KMA, Estie teaches both Brazilian Jiu Jitsu and Judo.

item.title: Godwin Langbayan
item.description: Instructor Godwin Langbayan BJJ and Boxing instructor at KMA. Training and coaching across both disciplines. BJJ Black Belt Boxing Team Fabricio About Godwin Langbayan BJJ and Boxing coach Godwin is an instructor at KMA who coaches across two disciplines — Brazilian Jiu Jitsu and Boxing. His ability to train students in both grappling and striking makes him a versatile member of the coaching team. Whether you're working on your ground game or sharpening your hands, Godwin brings focused, practical instruction to every session.

item.title: Judo
item.description: The Gentle Way Judo Throws, takedowns, and groundwork — the Olympic martial art that complements every grappler's game. The Program Master the art of throwing Judo at KMA is taught by Stephen Kamphuis, who holds a 2nd Degree Judo black belt and was an Oceania Judo Champion before discovering BJJ. His deep understanding of both arts means you'll learn throws and takedowns that work in competition and on the street.

item.title: Junior Grades
item.description: All Ranks Junior Grades Our youngest practitioners — building discipline, confidence, and technique from an early age. Green Belt James Carl Cantera 3 Stripes Raphael Facundo (Cenojas-Davao) Victor Santos Gabriel Yap Darlen Jenise Mitchell Orange Belt Athena Tatel Aiden Manibusan Andrei Obiso Ary Mahibubani 1 Stripe Antonio Luis Roberto Andy Pajaron Anita Jane Aguilar Ali Pagayatan 1 Stripe Blake Clement Siu Arianne Mahibubani Cassidy Tanddo Cyron Ray Bertis Daryl Caitlin Teo

item.title: Ken Menia
item.description: Instructor Ken Menia BJJ competitor and instructor at KMA. Philippine Jiu Jitsu Federation Selection Trials gold medalist. BJJ Black Belt Team Fabricio About Ken Competitor turned coach Ken Menia is a BJJ competitor and instructor at KMA. A gold medalist at the Philippine Jiu Jitsu Federation Selection Trials, Ken brings real competition experience to his teaching. At KMA, Ken focuses on BJJ instruction — helping students of all levels sharpen their technique on the mats.

item.title: Muay Thai
item.description: Striking Arts Muay Thai The art of eight limbs — punches, kicks, elbows, and knees. Private and group training available. The Program Complete striking training Our Muay Thai program covers the full range of Thai boxing — from basic stance and footwork to advanced combinations using punches, kicks, elbows, and knees. Training includes pad work, bag work, clinch practice, and conditioning. Whether you're training for fitness, self-defense, or competition, our coaches tailor the sessions to your goals.

item.title: Purple Belts
item.description: All Ranks Purple Belts Advanced understanding of technique and strategy — developing a personal game and the ability to teach. 4th Stripe Abraham Alzate Ivan Lord U. Regudo Nov 2024 Mel Andrew Palogan Dec 23 / June 24 / June 25 Juan Francis Lagniton Sept 25 Joanne Pauline Tan Sept 25 Rodel Pocholo Neri July 25 Timothy Alfaro Dec 24 / July 25 3rd Stripe Andy Robano Dec 23

item.title: Stephen Kamphuis
item.description: Head Instructor Stephen Kamphuis 5th Degree BJJ Black Belt. 7x World Masters Champion. President of the Philippine BJJ Federation. Building the sport in the Philippines for over two decades. BJJ 5th Degree Judo 2nd Degree Team Fabricio 7x World Masters Champion 30+ Schools Nationwide 20+ Years in Philippines 5th Degree Black Belt The Journey From New Zealand to the Philippines Stephen Kamphuis started his martial arts journey at 14 in New Zealand, when a Judo demonstration at his school changed his life.

item.title: White Belts
item.description: All Ranks White Belts The beginning of the journey. Learning fundamental positions, escapes, and submissions. Note: White belt is the beginner belt within Brazilian Jiu Jitsu. Stripes must be maintained through consistent training — white belt stripes are held for one year. If you do not train and grade within this period, the stripes may be withdrawn. 4th Stripe Amber Rose Lecito July 25 Allan Geromio Ali Espina Sept 25

item.title: Ziggy Roces
item.description: Instructor Ziggy Roces BJJ Black Belt under Stephen Kamphuis. Brazilian Jiu Jitsu instructor at KMA. BJJ Black Belt Team Fabricio About Ziggy Homegrown black belt Ziggy Roces is one of KMA's homegrown black belts — promoted by Stephen Kamphuis after years of dedicated training and competition. His belt reads "Z.ROCES" and carries the Fabricio International Team patch, a mark of the global BJJ family he represents. As an instructor, Ziggy focuses exclusively on Gi BJJ at KMA.
